items.title: VC Ron Conway says he has a ‘rare form of cancer’
items.summary: Conway wrote that he “will be stepping back from some of my usual activities,” but he will “continue to support” founders backed by his firm SV Angel.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
